rationale: Ins. Code §2210.003 contains general definitions for the Texas Windstorm Insurance Association chapter. It has no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 2210.003. GENERAL DEFINITIONS. In this chapter, unless the context clearly indicates otherwise:
_note: No conflict. The cited rule is a definitions section for windstorm insurance and does not reference property tax homestead exemptions.
